source_display: The Mental Model Gap in AI Adoption
evidence: You do not have a technology problem. You have a mental model problem... It's not that you lack the tools or even the knowledge, it's that people are collecting individual techniques without actually understanding how they fit.

source_display: Friends of Next Play AI Fundamentals Workshop
evidence: A public workshop on 'Fundamentals of AI Productivity' led by Vrijen Attawar (Careerspan co-founder/CEO), Logan Currie (Careerspan co-founder), and Ben Guo (Zo Computer co-founder).
Careerspan will aim to sell toward the middle of the year, but will use the next few months to attempt revenue generation to improve valuation.
